calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine That Asset Is Property Of Trust Under Probate Code
Off Calendar Apr-04-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Maureen McFadden for Cristina M. Shea, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The Court inquired about the account statement submitted with the petition, noting that it did not contain Christopher Shea's name. Ms. McFadden explained that the statement was provided by the petitioner and was the only documentation available from Schwab. She confirmed that the account, a rollover IRA, Roth IRA, and a stock account, were held solely in Christopher Shea's name, and that Schwab has been in communication with the petitioner regarding transferring the assets to the trust.

Ms. McFadden also addressed an issue regarding service of the petition on Christopher Shea's minor son, who is 10 years old. She stated that under the California Code of Civil Procedure, personal service on a minor under 12 is generally permitted through the parent. The minor's mother, who received a copy of the petition, waived personal service and expressed no objection to the petition or the transfer of assets to the trust.

The Court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
